title: Outreach & Beyond Astronomy
intro: Science communication, public engagement, teaching, mentoring, and activities beyond my core research work.

featured.title: President
featured.org: Physics and Astronomical Society (MUPAS), Macquarie University, Australia
featured.desc: Led a society of 300+ students across disciplines to promote inclusion, diversity, equity, and accessibility in physics- and astronomy-focused events, workshops, and student-led discussions. Organized “The Astronomy Night,” hosting 2,000+ visitors with public outreach events, exhibitions, and telescope observations at the Macquarie Observatory.

featured.title: Lead Organiser
featured.org: Harley Wood School of Astronomy (HWSA, ASA), Australia
featured.desc: Organized a 3-day national student astronomy retreat including invited research talks, workshops, and hands-on sessions.

featured.title: Scientific Assistant
featured.desc: Supported the ESO Observing Programmes Committee in reviewing telescope observing proposals.

items.title: Scientific Assistant
items.desc: Supported the ESO Observing Programmes Committee in reviewing telescope observing proposals.

items.title: Student Representative
items.org: Astronomical Society of Australia (ASA) National Council
items.desc: Represent the astronomy student research cohort nationwide for the Astronomical Society of Australia, contributing to policy and event planning for the student community.
